query:
-- Change flowcat from 093 to 046 and update localizacion to AVE. SAN JORGE for paradas 714 and 715
UPDATE paradas 
SET flow_cat = '046', localizacion = 'AVE. SAN JORGE'
WHERE cobertizo_id IN ('714', '715');
